data: Senior Advisor, Department of Health & Human Services
Hatfill Steven - --2025 DHHS POLITICAL APPOINTEES (NON PAS)  - New Entrant  - 278 - 2025 - 2025-03-20
ABSOG (Asymmetric Biodiversity Studies & Observation Group NFP)
Per filer, all service to ABSOG was uncompensated.
President and Member, Board of Directors, 3/2008 - 4/2025
Per filer, all service to ABRG was uncompensated.
Founding Member (solely advisory capacity relating to scientific matters), 4/2024 - 4/2025
Per filer, all service to DDP was uncompensated.
Secretary, Treasurer and Member, Board of Directors, 5/1984 - 4/2025
Per filer, ATSCC contracted with filer for training and paid filer through Templar Associates II.
Per filer, service to the Center began in the fall of 2019.  Month is estimated.
Senior Fellow (solely contributing to the formulation of policy positions by the Center in areas of pandemic preparedness and emerging infectious disease), 9/2019 - 4/2025

Per Filer:  Filer does not recall month position started. Filer did not receive any compensation from this entity, except for outside consulting work performed for third parties.  Filer confirmed he is no longer an officer, director, or owner of this entity.

Per filer: Annuity is part of a structured legal settlement with the U.S. government, managed by the Prudential Insurance Company.  Annuity is fixed and the value provided is a good faith estimate based on the amount payable for the remaining years of the settlement.
Payment as a contract training services provider.
Loan to Advanced Biological Research Group, Inc.

Per filer:  Value of this asset is difficult to ascertain.  Copyright in book, along with all proceeds derived therefrom, is fully vested in ABSOG.  Filer has no rights to the book or copyrighted material therein, receives no royalties or other payment derived from the book, and did not receive an advance for his role in writing the book.
Book:  Unmasked: The Painful Truth Behind the COVID-19 Tragedy

Per filer:  Value of this asset is difficult to ascertain. Copyright in book is co-owned by filer and the publisher, Recursion Media Group, Inc.  Filer did not receive an advance for this book, and has not received any payment based on sales of this book, which was published in February, 2025.
